documentation.description:
-
  Simple square-wave tone generation using the RP2040 PWM hardware.

  Ideal for driving buzzers, small speakers, or producing audible feedback.

subprograms.name: Equalisation
subprograms.code: function Equalisation (Target_Frequency : in RP.Hertz) return Pico.Analog.Percentage

documentation.returns:
E5  – very loud on most kit buzzers
E6
G5  – slight shoulder distortion

subprograms.name: Frequency_To_PWM
Output
Output
